about_item: Portable Pet Bed: This travel dog bed has a double offset soft to touch quilted quality construction; Measuring 30 x 39 inches, a poly-suede makes the top, and the ripstop on the bottom adds durability

Travel Ready: A must have with your best friend on the go, this outdoor bed fits most dogs and is perfect for camping, RV, going to the beach, or to keep it in the car; Machine washable and breathable for quick dry-out

Pet Toys: Get ready for bonding & fun with your dogs & cats! Check out a variety of our pet toy products such as flyers, perches & mirrors for birds, prey wand toys for cats, plush toys, light-up interactive toys & more.

Make Fetch Happen: Chuckit! Performance Toys Are Designed With You And Your Dog In Mind; Try Our Full Range Of Interactive Indoor And Outdoor Dog Toys Including Tumblers, Flyers, Fetch Toys, Chew Toys Other Balls For Dogs And More

Chuckit! Fetch Pet Toys: Chuckit! makes indoor and outdoor dog toys that enrich the human-animal bond and helps dogs and puppies stay engaged. Try our full line of ball launchers, puppy toys, flying discs, tennis balls for dogs, dog chew toys, and more

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed extremely transportable with its stuffsack and appreciate its portability for camping trips. The bed is praised for its quality and washability, staying clean for long periods and being easy to machine wash. It accommodates large dogs, with one customer noting it's big enough for two dogs to share, while another mentions it's perfect for a 50 lb border collie. Customers describe the bed as plush, with one noting it's soft without being bulky, and praise its durability, with one mentioning it stands up well to camping abuse. Customers find it comfortable, with one noting it remains comfortable through repeated washings, and appreciate its lightweight design that's not too bulky for packing.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the dog bed's portability, as it comes with a stuff sack for storage and travel, making it great for camping trips.

examples.snippet: Great travel bed. Stuffs down nice, water resistant, dirt resistant. Can't keep the cold ground from the dog at night if it's too cold, but it helped.
lightweight , easy to pack , throw it in the dirt & wash it when you get home . it’s held up great through a dozen camping trips so far ....
My two dogs love it and it is great for travel, camping and so easy to clean! It packs up just like a sleeping bag and stores easily.
An absolute positive winner of a dog bed. Well made, dog approved, and portable. For indoor or outdoors. You can't go wrong with this bed.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, describing it as an awesome bed and sleeping bag.

examples.snippet: Great product, perfect for camping with the dogs! Gives them a bed to sleep in the tent or just a place to settle while hanging out at the campsite....
Doggies r lovin them! Blissful comfort! Nice and plump! Not flat like some other brand! Easily washable and can be as mobile as your four legged pal!
...Works super well and out dog loved it. Very light weight, well made and durable. Crushes up into it's own bag for storage. Is washable. We love it.
...My lab mix is 65 pounds and it's still plenty large. Great bed because you can wash the whole thing after a trip and it stuffs into a small sack...

insights.title: Washability

examples.snippet: I liked the dog mat it is perfect for on the go doggies. Easy to clean, but unfortunately after the first wash and line dry the stitching came undone...
Sturdy, easy to wash, but not very soft or stuffed. Still looking for a thick, machine-washable large bed that doesn't bunch up and isn't expensive....
More durable that disposable dog beds. Machine washable! Thread has been broke in many places. However, the dogs haven't torn it to pieces just yet....
...They pack up small. They are also are washable. Which is great. They have a cool side and warm side. Most importantly the dogs really like them.

examples.snippet: Comfy, easy to clean, perfect size. Has made our RV trips with dogs 100 times better. Works in the car, in the RV, or outside....
...It's compact and easy to clean. I love that you can just throw it in the wash and won't lose its shape. Definitely recommend this for any dog.
This travel bed is large and bulky. I initially wanted it for backpacking, it wouldn't even fit in my boxers saddle bag....
...It's a great size and not heavy as well as comes with a nice travel stuff sack. I'm able to easily get it in the provided stuff sack as well....

Light weight, soft feel yet durable and stylish. Also it is nice size for my rat terrier: it can be fold into half and she can cover herself....

authors_reviews.title: Durable and dog Comfy
authors_reviews.text: Bought for out 17 pound dog when camping. Use it on top of a dog cot. Works super well and out dog loved it. Very light weight, well made and durable. Crushes up into it's own bag for storage. Is washable. We love it.
authors_reviews.author: David Srein

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for a lightweight, mobile dog pad March 2017 - update May 2019
authors_reviews.text: Update May 2019. I bought another one of these Chuckit! beds. After using the originally purchased bed around the house, in the car, etc., I ended up using it as a crate pad for my Border Collie over the last year while in dog class. It fits in the medium crate well. I like that it goes up the sides a bit (see picture) and I can collapse the crate down with the pad inside. Directions say to machine wash warm, tumble dry low. I have washed my original bed a few times, but I used cold water in our front loading washer and hung it up using the loop to dry. The original pad has held up great. I bought the second pad to use around the house, in the car, hikes, walks, etc., like I did with the first pad. For me, this travel pet bed has been a great find. Light, packable, washable, and my dog likes it.I originally purchased this bed in March of 2017 to use with clicker training as I wanted something light that I could easily take anywhere and this bed fits that need. I tried it gray side up and blue side up. The gray side definitely has a warmer feel to the touch. The blue side will make a rustling sound when rubbed, but it has not been a problem for us. I like the little loop tab on the bed that can be used to hang the bed on a hook to dry if it gets damp and I like that one can put the bed in the stuff bag to minimize the packing space needed when traveling. The bed is not thick, but it is just fine for using on the floor, ground, or in the vehicles. This bed is good for hiking, too. If you get in a windy situation, you can use a tent peg or something similar to stake the bed down using the loop. I have not washed this bed and if the need arises, I hope it will wash well because I really like it! I would definitely buy again.
authors_reviews.author: Traleah

authors_reviews.title: Liked it So Much I Bought a Second One
authors_reviews.text: Stuffable, washable, and tough. After having the first one for a few months, I bought another one to keep at home. My old dog enjoys it as is or with a blanket folded on top, which the napped surface holds in place. Is soft and thick enough while also being lightweight.
authors_reviews.author: AmazonShopper177

authors_reviews.title: Nice dog bed but could use some improvemnts
authors_reviews.text: I'll start this review by mentioning that I plan to use this dog bed indoors only. That will greatly effect the performance of any fabric dog bed. I'll also mention that my two dogs are not chewers. They are taught as puppies what they are allowed to have and what they are not. So chewing won't be an issue here. This dog bed was purchased to be used for travel, for staying in our tent while camping, staying in motels and in rental homes, with the idea of saving space in the car during travel.My border collies are 35 and 40 pounds. The Chuckit bed easily fits a dog of this size on it. I think it would accommodate a dog up to about 60 pounds. If your dog is way bigger than that, he likely will hang off over the edge.In my opinion, the fabric of this dog bed could be improved. The bottom fabric (the blue part) has a noisy, crinkly sound which is fine for my dogs, but if your dog is wiggy about noise, he may not like the crinkly sound under him when he moves. The fabric on the top holds dog hair like crazy. The hair sticks to it like Velcro. So if you want to keep this bed somewhat clean, you will need to use a lint brush on it now and then (or I used a dampened palm of my hand in swirls). I'm not sure why a dog bed company would choose such a fabric, as most dogs do shed. But it just is what it is and seems worth mentioning here.The dog bed won't hold it's shape well. If your dog is a nester, it will end up in a ball. It is nice and cushy though and maybe some dogs would prefer it that way. For extra cushioning, I also go a "Leisure Travel Camping Bed" here on Amazon, to put underneath this bed. That bed holds it's shape and will add extra warmth under this bed.The Chuckit dog bed easily folds up and stashes into the stuff sac included and becomes a manageable size which is nice.There are a number of one star reviews that complain about durability, but if you read those reviews carefully, they are cases where the dog bed is either being left outside or their dog has chewed the bed up. Sorry folks, but NO fabric dog bed will withstand an aggressive chewer OR the elements over time. So I just tossed reviews like that out in my head, as those are not realistic expectations of any fabric dog product.If your dog is trained to not chew and you want a nice travel bed for them, this could be a good option for you.
authors_reviews.author: JJ

authors_reviews.title: Great Packable Bed
authors_reviews.text: Bed is good - not thick, but great for outside. Packs easily into the storage bag.
authors_reviews.author: WVGail

authors_reviews.title: Awesome Portable Doggie Bed
authors_reviews.text: This is an awesome portable doggie bed! Very durable almost like durable, soft sleeping bag bottom, with an even softer top. Perfect size for almost all dogs. Easy to wash and clean, even washing machine capable on delicate loads. My dog instantly went to it, rolled around and got his scent on it, then passed out asleep. Comfortable buddy?!! He loves it. We use it on the porch / lanai, and take it inside for him while we settle in watching TV. He loves it so much I am buying another. One for porch / lanai, one for inside to watch TV. I highly recommend this product!
authors_reviews.author: anthony gorgone

authors_reviews.title: Probably the best travel dog bed I've ever purchased.
authors_reviews.text: I saw this on some list for camping with dogs and I wish I could remember/thank the person who listed them. The first thing I did was throw away the bag that the bed was stuffed in. I don't need that and it's a waste. My dogs are spoiled and have LOTS of options for things to sleep on. However, they REALLY love these beds. Picture a really plush and awesome sleeping bag for you, and that's what this dog bed is. It's the PERFECT size for my 60 lb dogs and they choose this bed over other options in the same room. I really bought these for camping, but the dogs love them so much that I use them in the house also. I will probably buy more. I wash in the washer (bulky cycle) and air dry in our 100+ South TX sunshine. They are easy to care for. What I also love is that the rawhide slime that sticks to the cover is easily brushed off/wiped off right after washing. (Other dog beds become permanently gross from dogs chewing rawhides on them.) The grey side is like a microfiber (and that's the side they sleep on) and the blue side is the nylon sleeping bag exterior. There is no grip to the fabric like the coleman beds I bought, but that's not something I need for the inside of the camper.
authors_reviews.author: Amy C

other_countries_reviews.title: Love it! Highly recommended.
other_countries_reviews.text: I love it, my pup too. Works well. I sleep on my mallome sleeping pad n I lay this beside me and he sleeps there. No more squeezing on the same bed anymore. Washes n dries easily. Doesn't puff up ridiculously or go out of shape. Love this so much. Packs up easily too. The price is great as well 😊😊😊
other_countries_reviews.author: JY

other_countries_reviews.title: No es tan acolchadita
other_countries_reviews.text: Pero a mí perro le gusta como tapete para descansar, la telancomo de algodón fresca , y la base impermeable.
other_countries_reviews.author: Carolina Salas

other_countries_reviews.title: Qualità come sempre
other_countries_reviews.text: Ottima...più alta rispetto alle stesse precedentemente acquistate ma il cane la adora e ci dorme comodamente sia d’estate che d’inverano

other_countries_reviews.title: Great for hols
other_countries_reviews.text: I've wanted one of these for ages but they're always sold out or extortionate prices on other shopping sites. Grabbed this as soon as I saw it re-available. Great for holidays, my boxer loves it, lightweight to carry in and out of accomodation. I'll use in summer in the garden on the grass too. Packs away easily.
other_countries_reviews.author: Claire Red

other_countries_reviews.title: Jederzeit wieder
other_countries_reviews.text: Ist groß genug für unseren 18 kG Mischling, weich genug und das tolle ist, dass die Haare ganz toll weggehen, wenn man das ganze abbeutelt. Wir haben es auf Reisen mit, und er weiß genau, dass das sein Platz ist, da es zu Hause auch als Bettmöglichkeit herumliegt!
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Kunde
